cards.title: Latency, Throughput, and Tail Behavior
cards.governance_note: Measure end-to-end response time, latency distribution, P95/P99 behavior, throughput, and error rates.

cards.title: Queues, Bottlenecks, and Backpressure
cards.governance_note: Review queue depth, utilization, bottlenecks, backpressure, load shedding, retry storms, and overload behavior.

cards.title: Cost, Observability, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Audit cost per unit work, traceability, cache freshness, partial results, performance regressions, and governance ownership.
